reviews.comment: First time using FWT and they deserve 10+ stars!! We inherited a vehicle with window tint too dark to pass Maryland inspection. FWT already had a full schedule but Sharyn and Joe were able to adjust their schedule on 9/9/21 so we would not have to reschedule the vehicle title appointment. Compassion for others, knowledgeable and professionalism shows in the quality of their work. We are forever customers and highly recommend FWT for all your tinting needs.

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhbUxTakJREAE

reviews.comment:
I recently moved to the Frederick area and I've been searching for a tint shop in the area to help me with tinting my newly purchased vehicle. I found FWT and after looking at reviews, I decided to give them a call. My initial calls were missed, however, within 20 minutes, Sharyn texted me to follow up and provided me with an extremely personal and high touch experience. Everything from answering questions to providing me the quote for the different levels of tint that they offer.
I had asked for weekend hours, since their website did reflect the shop being opened on the weekend. Even though they were fully booked for the weekend that I had asked about, in order to fit me in, Sharyn and Joe scheduled me for an appointment outside of their business hours.
I had the pleasure of hanging out with Joe while he did the install, and I also had the pleasure of meeting the family.
I highly recommend FWT to anyone looking for tint needs. They will definitely take great care of you!

Thank you Sharyn and Joe!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for this thoughtful review! It was our pleasure! 😊
